message.content:
@startuml
participant "Crapchat user" as User1
participant "Another Crapchat user" as User2
participant "Crapchat REST API" as RESTAPI
participant "Crapchat identity provider" as IdentityProvider
participant "Crapchat storage" as Storage

section Search user
    User1 --> RESTAPI : HTTP POST request with search query
    RESTAPI --> IdentityProvider : HTTP request with search query
    IdentityProvider --> RESTAPI : HTTP response with list of users
    RESTAPI --> User1 : HTTP response with array of users
end section

section Send follow request
    User1 --> RESTAPI : Clicks follow button
    User1 --> RESTAPI : HTTP request with ID of the user to follow
    RESTAPI --> Storage : SQL insert query
    RESTAPI --> User2 : Success response
    RESTAPI --> User1 : Notify with follow request
    User1 --> RESTAPI : HTTP OK response
end section

section Accept follow request
    User2 --> RESTAPI : HTTP request to accept
    RESTAPI --> Storage : SQL update query
    RESTAPI --> User2 : Success response
    RESTAPI --> User2 : HTTP OK response
end section

@enduml
